narrative:
Precinct Goshen North (precinct in Champaign County) has 649 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
